In addition, it can also be used to clamp small electronic parts, and nail accessories, such as rhinestones, crystals etc. 4.Oblique Tweezers- 45° bevel design, used for large flat areas of the face, and corners that are difficult to clean, such as the wing of nose. The tweezers can also be used for false eyelashes extension. 5.Curved Tweezers- The unique hook-shaped design, make it easy to remove large acne. For stubborn acne and blackheads, you can squeeze them with the tweezers first, and then clamp them away. Instructions: 1. Clean face with warm water to soften cuticles and open pores. 2. Use alcohol to disinfect tools. 3. Select suitable tools to remove acne, blackheads, comedone and pimple, etc. 4. Clean the face again and apply toner and cream according to personal needs. Tips *Please use alcohol to sterilize tools before and after use. *Please use with caution around eyes. *The tips of tools are sharp, please use and store carefully. 1.Multifunctional Acne and Blackhead Removal Kit- There are three different shapes of tweezers to meet different facial care needs.

1. Clean face with warm water to soften cuticles and open pores.

2. Use alcohol to disinfect tools.

3. Select suitable tools to remove acne, blackheads, comedone and pimple, etc.

4. Clean the face again and apply toner and cream according to personal needs.

Tips

*Please use alcohol to sterilize tools before and after use.

*Please use with caution around eyes.

*The tips of tools are sharp, please use and store carefully. Keep them away from children.
